description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic, slightly bulging cylindrical shape and a flat, closed top. The body is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each displaying a natural wood grain texture in light to medium brown tones. Three wide, metallic bands encircle the barrel horizontally, providing structural reinforcement and a silvery-gray contrast to the wood. The metal bands are fastened with visible rivets, adding to the rugged, utilitarian appearance. The top surface is composed of wooden planks fitted tightly together, with no visible opening or lid. The overall finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture typical of untreated or lightly finished wood and metal.
description: A wooden barrel reinforced with three wide metal bands and a closed, flat wooden top. The wood is light brown with visible grain, and the metal bands are silvery-gray with rivets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's bulging shape, wood grain, and three prominent metal bands with rivets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the staves and the even spacing of the metal bands.
description_view_2: Another side view with a clear look at the wood texture and the metallic reinforcement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the same features, with the metal bands and wood grain visible all around.
